title: Self-Awareness
objective: Students will explore self-awareness concepts including Your Impact on Others.

steps.content: Welcome to an exciting lesson about Your Impact on Others!
Reflect on how your behaviour lands on others — consider not just what you intended but what the actual impact was on the other person
Time to try this out: Describe how something they said or did affected someone else — e.g. 'When I didn't include them, they looked upset'
Can you think about how something they said or did might have felt to the other person — not just what they meant by it, but what the impact actually was?

Great job! Today we learned about Your Impact on Others. Describe how something they said or did affected someone else — e.g. 'When I didn't include them, they looked upset' Predict what might happen before acting — e.g. 'If I take the last one without asking, they'll feel it's unfair'
